revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_compare%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tlf|cite compare}} is a debug and documentation tool that allows editors to compare the output created by the various versions of a {{cs1}} (CS1) template. To invoke {{tlf|cite compare}} simply add CS1 template parameters to {{tlc|cite compare}}. For example, a simple {{tlf|cite web}} comparison might look like this: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} which produces this output: {{cite compare |mode=web |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} == Usage == The default display is a comparison between sandbox and the current live CS1 template. {{tlf|cite compare}} is controlled by four parameters: * {{para|template}} – selects which of the CS1 templates will be compared; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|template|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|template|journal}}; etc.; '''alias''': {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} (deprecated) ** {{para|{{xtd|mode}}}} – deprecated alias of {{para|template}}; for {{tlx|cite web}}, {{para|mode|web}}; for {{tlx|cite journal}}, {{para|mode|journal}}; etc.; deprecated because cs1|2 supports a parameter called {{para|mode}} * {{para|old}} – when set to yes, includes the citation as rendered by {{tlx|citation/core}} * {{para|comment}} – when set to a comment, displays the comment at the bottom of the comparison table * {{para|header}} – when set, displays additional header text * {{para|nosandbox}} – when set, removes the line for the sandbox === Display only live === {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |nosandbox=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare old, live and sandbox=== Adding {{para|old|yes}} will display a comparison of all three versions of a CS1 citation: the current live template, the sandbox template, and the old, pre-Lua-based versions. The non-Lua-based templates are at pages labeled old; for example, {{tl|cite web/old}} is the reference version against which the initial Lua implementation to {{tlf|cite web}} were compared. {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |old=yes |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} ===Compare with comment=== To add a comment regarding the comparison, set {{para|comment|}}. If contains a vertical bar or pipe (|) use {{tlx|!}}. {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} {{cite compare |template=web |comment=Comment about {{!}}comment= |header=(additional header text) |url=http://www.example.com |website=Example Website |title=Example comparison}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Citation utility templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
